backend/main.mo: Motoko backend defining shops, clothing items, search filters, item details, photo storage, and initialization logic using in‑memory lists and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature report documenting a missing-image-assets requirement with metadata, components involved, and related tests.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing major frontend React files and their roles in routing, pages, components, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes and applying global background/foreground defaults.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with root layout and three routes: category selection, search, and results.
frontend/src/components/aura/AppLayout.t: Root layout with header, footer, and shop initialization via backend actor on mount.
frontend/src/components/aura/ItemCard.ts: Displays a clothing item card with image handling, category badges, price, and shop availability count.
frontend/src/components/aura/ItemDetailD: Modal dialog showing item details, shop list, and image upload workflow with live preview.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook creating and refreshing the backend actor based on Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuraQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for categories, item searches, item details, shop counts, and photo upload using an actor backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity auth context and provider using Dfinity AuthClient with login, logout, and status handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind base styles and defines custom light/dark theme CSS variables and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CategorySelectionPage: Displays category cards fetched from backend and navigates to the search page on selection.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Runs item searches based on filters and shows results with optional detail dialog and error/loading states.
frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx: Form page for entering item filters and navigating to results, with category-based suggestions.
frontend/src/utils/assetPaths.ts: Normalizes item photo URLs, handling absolute links and local asset paths.
Maps categories to human-readable labels and icon components with fallbacks.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, extended theme options (fonts, colors, animations), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, image requirements, existing features, and pending feature requests related to adding correct product images.
